subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! Thy letter was received and its contents testified to thy firmness and steadfastness. Render thou thanks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه ملکوت الله نامه تو رسید مضمون دلالت بر ثبوت و استقامت مینمود شکر کن
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
